title: Create WhatsApp QR registration dialog component
description: Create src/components/whatsapp/WhatsAppQRRegistrationDialog.tsx using Dialog pattern. Display QR as img with base64 data URI. Implement React Query polling (3 sec) stopping when status===connected. Handle QR refresh and timeout. Update stores table on success.

title: Add database fields for WhatsApp sender registration
description: Create migration in supabase/migrations/ for stores table adding: whatsapp_sender_id (VARCHAR), whatsapp_sender_registered (BOOLEAN DEFAULT false), whatsapp_sender_phone (VARCHAR). These fields store sender registration state per store.

title: Add WhatsApp registration UI to StoreSettingsCard
description: In src/pages/StoreSettingsCard.tsx add section after Points (line ~254): status indicator showing registered phone, button with text 'Register WhatsApp' or 'Change WhatsApp Number', toggle for wa_use_store_number enabled after registration. Opens WhatsAppQRRegistrationDialog.

title: Update store data on successful WhatsApp registration
description: In WhatsAppQRRegistrationDialog when status===connected: update stores table with whatsapp_sender_id, whatsapp_sender_phone, whatsapp_sender_registered:true. Show success toast, close dialog, refresh parent state.

title: Extend WhatsApp service layer with registration methods
description: In src/integrations/whatsapp/service.ts and client.ts add: 1) getQRCode() method returning {sessionId, qrCodeBase64}, 2) checkRegistrationStatus(sessionId) method returning {status, senderId, qrCode}. Add TypeScript interfaces QRRegistrationResponse and RegistrationStatusResponse.

title: Create serverless API proxy for WhatsApp registration
description: Create api/whatsapp-register-sender.js with POST /api/whatsapp-register-sender endpoint (proxies to whatspoints /api/register-sender-qr) and GET /api/whatsapp-register-status endpoint (proxies to whatspoints /api/register-sender-status/:sessionId). Handle Basic Auth to whatspoints service server-side.

title: WhatsApp Sender Registration - QR Code Integration
description: Add self-service WhatsApp sender registration for store owners by integrating whatspoints API to get QR code, display it with polling, and handle timeout/re-registration scenarios. One sender per store.
